name: Laal Roti
recipeIngredient: Vegetable oil or ghee for shallow frying
recipeInstructions:
----------------VARIATION: MITHA LAAL ROTI----------------
50 grams Sugar, castor (or jaggery)
Grated
Sift the whole wheat flour into a bowl. Add salt, 2 tablespoons oil or ghee, cardamom powder, and grated beet (beetroot), mixing well. Gradually add water, kneading until a smooth dough forms.
Divide the dough into 9 equal portions. Shape each portion into round balls. Flatten each ball and roll out to a disc with a diameter of about 12 cm (5 inches). Dust with extra flour.
Heat a griddle over low heat. Cook one roti at a time, using 2-3 tablespoons oil or ghee. Shallow fry the rotis, turning once or twice until both sides are cooked and lightly browned. VARIATION: MITHA LAAL ROTI
Use the same ingredients as Laal Roti. Add 50 grams sugar (castor) or grated jaggery before kneading with water and proceed as directed. Children love this roti.
